scenarios.description: load() with default systemProperties=false sets each parsed entry as System property
scenarios.precondition: Temporary .env file with one entry 'KEY1=VAL1' exists
pseudocode: TEST TC06 load default systemProperties sets sysprops
// Arrange a temp directory with .env containing 'KEY1=VAL1'

scenarios.description: load() with missing .env file and ignoreIfMissing() suppresses exception and returns empty Dotenv
scenarios.precondition: No .env file in empty temp directory
pseudocode: TEST TC07 ignoreIfMissing suppresses missing-file exception

scenarios.description: load() with malformed line and default throwIfMalformed=true throws DotenvException
scenarios.precondition: Temporary .env file with one well-formed and one malformed line exists

scenarios.description: load() with malformed line and ignoreIfMalformed() suppresses exception and skips malformed entries
scenarios.precondition: Temporary .env file containing one valid 'X=Y' and one malformed line
scenarios.expectedResult: no exception; entries(entry->true).size() == 1 and contains X

scenarios.description: entries(null) returns full entries set including system env variables
scenarios.precondition: One entry in .env; builder.load() invoked; call entries(null)
scenarios.expectedResult: entries(null) size > entries(e->true) size and contains both file and env entries
pseudocode: TEST TC10 entries null filter returns combined set
// Arrange .env with 'A=B' and set a real System env var 'PATH'

scenarios.description: get(key, default) returns default when neither system env nor file contains the key
pseudocode: TEST TC11 get with default returns default when missing
// Arrange empty .env without 'NONEXISTENT' and ensure System.getenv('NONEXISTENT') is null
